sourceList.title: Agnes de Bar, “Find A Grave Index”
Foundation for Medieval Genealogy - AGNES de Bar ([1177]-19 Jun 1226, bur Abbaye de Beaupré).

Foundation for Medieval Genealogy - FERRY de Lorraine m (before mid-Jul 1189) AGNES de Bar, Dame d'Amance, de Longwy et de Stenay, daughter of THIBAUT Comte de Bar & his first wife Laurette de Looz ([1177]-19 Jun 1226, bur Abbaye de Beaupré).

zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnès de Bar於1173年出生在法國洛萊莫瑟勒布利時，她的父親Thiébaut Ier de Bar17歲，母親Laurette van Loon23歲。她於1189年7月與Ferry II duc de Lorraine在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇洛斯林根結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1226年6月21日在法國享年53歲，埋葬在法國洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒蒙瑟爾-利斯-倫艾維爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnès de Bar于1173年出生在法国洛萊莫瑟勒布利时，她的父亲Thiébaut Ier de Bar17岁，母亲Laurette van Loon23岁。她于1189年7月与Ferry II duc de Lorraine在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇洛斯林根结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1226年6月21日在法国享年53岁，埋葬在法国洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒蒙瑟爾-利斯-倫艾維爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bar
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Moshe, Giora, Ilan, Arie, Eliahu, Hadassa, Haim, Menashe, Mordechai, Nadav, Nir, Noam.  French Dany, Francois, Henri.  German Hans, Gerhard, Willi.
Jewish (Ashkenazic; also Bär): from the Yiddish male personal name Ber (see Baer 2).
German (Bär): variant of Baer 1 ‘bear’ and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this and of its cognate Bähr (see Bahr 2).

variants.name: Baer
meanings: German (also Bär): from Middle High German ber ‘bear’, a nickname for someone thought to resemble the animal in some way, a metonymic occupational name for someone who kept a performing bear, or a topographic or habitational name referring to a house distinguished by the sign of a bear. In some cases it may derive from a personal name containing this element. Compare Bar 2.
Jewish (Ashkenazic; also Bär): from the Yiddish male personal name Ber, from Yiddish ber ‘bear’. Compare Bar 1.
Germanized form (also Bär) of Sorbian Běr: see Bar 3.

variants.name: Dubar
meanings: French (mainly Nord): habitational name, with fused preposition and definite article du ‘from the’, denoting someone from any of several places called Bar (see Bar ).

variants.name: Debar
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Laurent, Pierre.
French: habitational name, with fused preposition de ‘from’, denoting someone from any of several places called Bar (see Bar ).

nameMeanings.name: Agnès
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnès de Bar was born in 1173, in Briey, Moselle, Lorraine, France, her father, Thiébaut Ier de Bar, was 17 and her mother, Laurette van Loon, was 23. She married Ferry II duc de Lorraine in July 1189, in Lorraine, Holy Roman Empire. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 21 June 1226, in France, at the age of 53, and was buried in Moncel-lès-Lunéville, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnès de Bar est née en 1173, à Briey, Moselle, Lorraine, France, son père, Thiébaut Ier de Bar, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Laurette van Loon, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Ferry II duc de Lorraine en juillet 1189, à Lorraine, Saint-Empire romain. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 21 juin 1226, à France, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterrée à Moncel-lès-Lunéville, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnès de Bar 1173 in Briey, Mosel, Lothringen, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thiébaut Ier de Bar 17 und ihre Mutter Laurette van Loon 23. Sie hat im Juli 1189 in Lothringen, Heiliges Römisches Reich Ferry II duc de Lorraine geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 21. Juni 1226 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Frankreich und wurde in Moncel-lès-Lunéville, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lothringen, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnès de Bar è nata il nel 1173 nel Briey, Moselle, Lorraine, Francia, sua padre, Thiébaut Ier de Bar, aveva 17 anni e sua madre, Laurette van Loon, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Ferry II duc de Lorraine nel luglio 1189, nel Lothringen, Heiliges Römisches Reich. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 21 giugno 1226, nel Francia, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolta a Moncel-lès-Lunéville, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnès de Barが1173年にフランスロレィヌモセルブリーイで生まれた時，父Thiébaut Ier de Barは17歳，母Laurette van Loonは23歳であった。1189年7月にヘイリジェズ ルoミシェス レイチロスリンジェンでFerry II duc de Lorraineと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1226年6月21日にフランスで53歳で死去し，フランスロレィヌメウルスエ-エト-モセルモンセル-ルeス-ルンeヴィルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnès de Bar(이)가 1173년 프랑스 로레이인 모셀 브리이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thiébaut Ier de Bar(은)는 17세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Laurette van Loon(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1189년 7월 헤이리그스 o미슈스 라이치 로스링에서 Ferry II duc de Lorraine(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1226년 6월 21일 프랑스에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 로레이인 우르테-트-모셀 몬셀-e스-루e빌에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnès de Bar nasceu em 1173, em Briey, Moselle, Lorraine, França, seu pai, Thiébaut Ier de Bar, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Laurette van Loon, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Ferry II duc de Lorraine em julho de 1189, em Lothringen, Heiliges Römisches Reich. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 21 de junho de 1226, em França, com 53 anos, e foi sepultada em Moncel-lès-Lunéville, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnès de Bar родилась в 1173 г. в местности брии, моселл, лорреаин, Франция, её отцу по имени Thiébaut Ier de Bar было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Laurette van Loon, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ferry II duc de Lorraine июль 1189 г. в местности лотринген, хилигесь рoмищесь раич. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 21 июня 1226 г. в местности Франция в возрасте 53 лет и была похоронена в местности монсел-лeс-лунeвилл, меурте-ет-моселл, лорреаин, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnès de Bar nació en 1173, en Briey, Moselle, Lorraine, Francia, su papá, Thiébaut Ier de Bar, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Laurette van Loon, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Ferry II duc de Lorraine en julio de 1189, en Lothringen, Heiliges Römisches Reich. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 21 de junio de 1226, en Francia, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultada en Moncel-lès-Lunéville, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia.
